posts.author: stefan234 (Stefan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I would like to create a view/board for each person in my small team where they can see the following information on a daily basis:

1. Total amount of time booked on that day

2. A list of the tanks that were booked on that day (and how much each)

I have only managed to solve the first one, but not the task list with the booked times. Unfortunately, ChatGPT didn’t help me either.

Do you know anything?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
stefan234:

Hello everyone,

I would like to create a view/board for each person in my small team where they can see the following information on a daily basis:

  1. Total amount of time booked on that day

  2. A list of the tanks that were booked on that day (and how much each)

I have only managed to solve the first one, but not the task list with the booked times. Unfortunately, ChatGPT didn’t help me either.

Do you know anything

Hi,

This sounds easy to achieve on Monday if your work planning is set up right and people are assigned to tasks with estimated effort.

Could they use the My Work section of monday to see the list and total amount of time booked on that day or the workload view?

image847×473 71 KB

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010699760-The-Workload-Widget

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @stefan234 ! You can actually get this pretty easily with Time in Status for monday.com.
monday’s built-in time tracking only gives you the total per day, but not the list of tasks + how much time was logged on each one for a specific date.

Time in Status gives you daily breakdowns per user, per item, per board, so each person can have their own view showing:

  • total hours tracked today
  • and each task they logged time on, with exact durations.

Super helpful if you’re trying to build personal daily timesheets or workload insights.
